brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 31, mirroring the anxious capitulation seen during the August 2024 bottom. Yet beneath the surface, surging stablecoin growth and gold's persistent strength signal that smart capital is quietly building a war chest, waiting for the panic to exhaust itself. The current sideways regime isn't distribution—it's a classic re-accumulation coil being wound tight by weak hands transferring assets to patient, solvent buyers.
brain_consensus.headline: Quiet Accumulation Beneath the Panic

next_move.reasoning: Score sits at 31 (Fear/Greed), placing us in Anxiety band (39-46) is wrong—recalculating: Fear/Greed 31 falls in Panic (24-31). But composite score from all factors suggests ~45-50 range, Anxiety/Complacency border. Given the 79% match to Disbelief bottom_2024_aug yet current price $65K vs $52K then, the analog is stretched—ETF flows at 100 and BTC dominance fade at 50 vs 25 show this is NOT the same structural bottom; MVRV collapsed -16 points while price rose, indicating distribution not accumulation. The 0% transition accuracy and 0/43 coil statistic demand HOLD; no breaker visible—funding elevated (54), VIX elevated (62), DXY weakness present but not accelerating. This reads as post-ETF-approval chop, not early recovery.
